onboarding.welcome.title:
Just capture.
Memsum takes care of it.
onboarding.welcome.subtitle: It's okay to forget. I'll bring it back for you.
onboarding.value1.title:
Don't sort it.
Just capture.
onboarding.value1.body: The moment you take a screenshot, Memsum sorts it for you.
onboarding.value2.title:
Plans land on
your calendar.
onboarding.value2.body: When there's a date and a place, I'll quietly add it to your calendar.
onboarding.value3.title:
Every Sunday,
your top 5.
onboarding.value3.body: Every Sunday, I bring back the 5 things — plans and details — you'd otherwise have let slip.
onboarding.pager.label: Onboarding step {current} of {total}

report.empty.body: That's fine. Once 5 add up, I'll bring back what you'd forgotten, every Sunday.
report.coachmark.title: Almost forgot, didn't you?
report.coachmark.body: I picked out the 5 from this week worth a second look. Even the details you'd nearly buried — you'll find them again here.
